tagline: A gallery of web motion & WebGL effects — copy the prompt, generate your own with AI.

home.heroSub: Browse curated demos from across the web. Like an effect? Copy its AI prompt and generate your own — free ones are open, premium ones unlock with a one-time payment.
home.empty: No demos yet. Run the crawler or seed the database.

demo.promptHint: Paste this into your AI tool (Claude, Cursor, v0, …) to generate the effect.
demo.unlockSub: One-time payment. Pay by card, Alipay or WeChat Pay.
demo.attribution: This demo is curated from an external source. All credit goes to the original author; the link above points to the original work.

upload.title: Share your demo
upload.sub: Publish your own motion effect. Add a prompt so others can regenerate it, and choose whether the prompt is free or premium.
upload.onlyOriginal: Only upload work you created or have the rights to. Attributed third-party demos should link back to their source instead.
upload.success: Published! View it in the gallery.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.sub: MotionHub is free to browse. You only pay to unlock premium prompts — one time, per demo.
premiumList: Pay by card, Alipay or WeChat Pay
creatorList: Set your own prompts free or premium

footer.note: Curated demos link back to their original authors. Prompts are for regenerating your own effects with AI tools.
